item.title: 中共國防部長董軍放狠話，威脅美日菲台四國！太空登月只是用韭菜的錢來維穩？習近平加速走向黨國大潰敗...
item.itunes:title: 中共國防部長董軍放狠話，威脅美日菲台四國！太空登月只是用韭菜的錢來維穩？習近平加速走向黨國大潰敗...
item.itunes:author: 公子沈 Mr. Shen
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mOgJfWH4Nog #中共 #國防部長 #董軍 在#新加坡 #香格里拉論壇 扮戰狼，放狠話威脅美日菲台四國！#嫦娥 登月計畫只是用韭菜的錢來維穩！#習近平 加速走向黨國大潰敗...【#公子時評 #公子沈 第2336期】 加入會員：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrGSFNEBmCN0rqhATZels2Q/join VPN推荐：https://www.expressvpn.com/shen 公子沈社媒帳號： https://www.twitter.com/terenceshen https://www.facebook.com/gongzishiping
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mOgJfWH4Nog #中共 #國防部長 #董軍 在#新加坡 #香格里拉論壇 扮戰狼，放狠話威脅美日菲台四國！#嫦娥 登月計畫只是用韭菜的錢來維穩！#習近平 加速走向黨國大潰敗...【#公子時評 #公子沈 第2336期】 加入會員：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrGSFNEBmCN0rqhATZels2Q/join VPN推荐：https://www.expressvpn.com/shen 公子沈社媒帳號： https://www.twitter.com/terenceshen https://www.facebook.com/gongzishiping
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mOgJfWH4Nog #中共 #國防部長 #董軍 在#新加坡 #香格里拉論壇 扮戰狼，放狠話威脅美日菲台四國！#嫦娥 登月計畫只是用韭菜的錢來維穩！#習近平 加速走向黨國大潰敗...【#公子時評 #公子沈 第2336期】 加入會員：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrGSFNEBmCN0rqhATZels2Q/join VPN推荐：https://www.expressvpn.com/shen 公子沈社媒帳號： https://www.twitter.com/terenceshen https://www.facebook.com/gongzishiping

item.title: 00後中國留學生美國國會演講，年輕一代首次登上國際政治舞台！六四35週年聽證會，加拿大公民會創辦人/民運人士楊若暉發言片段【公子分享】
item.itunes:title: 00後中國留學生美國國會演講，年輕一代首次登上國際政治舞台！六四35週年聽證會，加拿大公民會創辦人/民運人士楊若暉發言片段【公子分享】
item.itunes:author: 公子沈 Mr. Shen
item.itunes:summary:
Mr and Madam we'll have you turn on your. microphone. please hello um I just want to say I. highly agree with my right honorable. friend Mr Joe just said uh the Chinese. Communist party has leashed a war on its. own people that's why also brought this. one with. me this medal was issued to those. soldiers who shot student on Square 35. years ago in normal Nations medals are. given to the soldier Who's acting. distinguished and Brave on the. battlefield against the enemy but in. China the enemy it appears to be its own. people is said commemorative of putting. down the riot those soldiers get this. medal not because of their bravery but. because they're CED not because fighting. the enemy but slaughter their own. people and My Story begins 5 years ago. the 5 years ago today the 30 anniversary.

of durun the 4th I took the street for. the first time committing myself into. the movement of democracy in China I was. deeply intimidated by the atmosphere of. fear cultivated by Chinese Communist. party in. Canada however the 200000 Hong Kong 2019. Hong Kong anti- extradition movement has. further secured my determination of. engaging into the Chinese Democracy. movement in Toronto I have actively. participated with my Hong Kong friends. organizing support report on Democracy. movement supporting the Hong Kong people. as someone from mainland China I have. faced huge pressure from my own. Community dealing with psychological. stress from the harassment of the. Communist supporters and also the. suffering from political. Melancholy things that happened during. the protest remind me that the national.

border cannot stop CCP from spreading. fears. overseas some Chinese organized and. encourag Ed by the consolate drove their. luxury cars through our processing line. and shouting. insults they burned our flowers at the. Statue of democracy some protesters even. received death threatening my life was. full of harassment of the. strangers in 2020 Dr Leon The. Whistleblower of covid-19 who could. possibly Stop This Global catastrophe. from happening was arrested by the. Chinese police of so-called spreading. false statement and labeled as a. criminal he died shortly after due to. the. virus but. surprisingly I witnessed many young. Chinese students attended a m Memorial. event we organized in downtown Toronto.

which deeply moved me I called on. everyone to be organized and bound. together to overcome the fear and. despera and fight for a life of humanity. human rights democracy and freedom. this led the founding of our. organization assembly of citizens over. three years of covid-19 the Young. Generation in China has suffered from. other human right disaster during the. white paper Revolution winter 2022 the. Assembly of Citizen is capable to. organize event and protest across Canada. more professionally more. faster as a group our friend in Europe. became the mailbox of contributors and. resistance Fighters inside great. firewall becoming one of the most. influential acts account as manding. account he collected testimony and. stories for human right catastrophes and. told those stories has been neglected by.

the international Society to millions of. people every day and simultaneously. facing the threats of the Communist. party our friend in US is making movies. talk shows and all forms of Arts in. order to spread the awareness. of the oppression of human rights in. China our friend in Japan and Korea is. trying to establish creative business to. emphasize resistance as a lifestyle. through dealing with various issues we. we realized how to avoid divisions build. a professional organizations and more. inclusive and strong link with other. groups 29 years ago in this very same. Congressional Hall Major General Charles. swiy who testified about the decision. dropping atomic bombs used to said one. can only forgive by remembering and to. forget is to risk repeating history the. last rapid deterioration of Human Rights. and their major power is 1933 in.

Germany that year when they enacted the. enabling act which brought German and. the. dictatorship in that year Peter draer. began writing his first book the end of. economic men the origence of. totalitarianism today as we open this. book we feel if history is actually. repeating itself let me adopt some of. his words in today's situation in. China the Chinese substitute CCP for. order but they cannot have a real order. and they worship Xi Jinping when they. have no God to worship. showing its very intensity that they. must have an order a Creed a radical. concept of. man military intimidation against Taiwan. the suppression of. Freedom persecution against lgbtq groups. the re education camps for wias and. Tibetans and the war against religion.

are sign of weakness instead of. strength the more desperate the Chinese. become the the more strongly entrenched. will totalitarianism appear to be the. further they push tot to to totalitarian. Road the greater will they. despair however as soon as we offered an. alternative the whole totalitarian magic. will vanish like a. nightmare this is the current situation. in China and this is our mission we hope. we can show all Chinese a new choice of. possibility for democracy and freedom. lifestyle with dignity and value of. Human. Rights therefore I believe my colleagues. can do their job well I trust my. predecessor from T Square generation can. cooperate effectively I trust my aines. can stand with us and I also believe. that you can make the right. choice ladies and gentlemen of the.

committee I truly appreciate for. listening to my story we doing the best. we can but your help is necessary as. well after all this future belongs to us. belongs to them and belongs to you thank. you.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M9hypBpN-cQ

【#楊若暉 #公民會 #公子時評 #公子沈 】

加入會員：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrGSFNEBmCN0rqhATZels2Q/join

VPN推荐：https://www.expressvpn.com/shen

公子沈社媒帳號：

https://www.twitter.com/terenceshen

https://www.facebook.com/gongzishiping
item.description:
Mr and Madam we'll have you turn on your. microphone. please hello um I just want to say I. highly agree with my right honorable. friend Mr Joe just said uh the Chinese. Communist party has leashed a war on its. own people that's why also brought this. one with. me this medal was issued to those. soldiers who shot student on Square 35. years ago in normal Nations medals are. given to the soldier Who's acting. distinguished and Brave on the. battlefield against the enemy but in. China the enemy it appears to be its own. people is said commemorative of putting. down the riot those soldiers get this. medal not because of their bravery but. because they're CED not because fighting. the enemy but slaughter their own. people and My Story begins 5 years ago. the 5 years ago today the 30 anniversary.

of durun the 4th I took the street for. the first time committing myself into. the movement of democracy in China I was. deeply intimidated by the atmosphere of. fear cultivated by Chinese Communist. party in. Canada however the 200000 Hong Kong 2019. Hong Kong anti- extradition movement has. further secured my determination of. engaging into the Chinese Democracy. movement in Toronto I have actively. participated with my Hong Kong friends. organizing support report on Democracy. movement supporting the Hong Kong people. as someone from mainland China I have. faced huge pressure from my own. Community dealing with psychological. stress from the harassment of the. Communist supporters and also the. suffering from political. Melancholy things that happened during. the protest remind me that the national.

border cannot stop CCP from spreading. fears. overseas some Chinese organized and. encourag Ed by the consolate drove their. luxury cars through our processing line. and shouting. insults they burned our flowers at the. Statue of democracy some protesters even. received death threatening my life was. full of harassment of the. strangers in 2020 Dr Leon The. Whistleblower of covid-19 who could. possibly Stop This Global catastrophe. from happening was arrested by the. Chinese police of so-called spreading. false statement and labeled as a. criminal he died shortly after due to. the. virus but. surprisingly I witnessed many young. Chinese students attended a m Memorial. event we organized in downtown Toronto.

which deeply moved me I called on. everyone to be organized and bound. together to overcome the fear and. despera and fight for a life of humanity. human rights democracy and freedom. this led the founding of our. organization assembly of citizens over. three years of covid-19 the Young. Generation in China has suffered from. other human right disaster during the. white paper Revolution winter 2022 the. Assembly of Citizen is capable to. organize event and protest across Canada. more professionally more. faster as a group our friend in Europe. became the mailbox of contributors and. resistance Fighters inside great. firewall becoming one of the most. influential acts account as manding. account he collected testimony and. stories for human right catastrophes and. told those stories has been neglected by.

the international Society to millions of. people every day and simultaneously. facing the threats of the Communist. party our friend in US is making movies. talk shows and all forms of Arts in. order to spread the awareness. of the oppression of human rights in. China our friend in Japan and Korea is. trying to establish creative business to. emphasize resistance as a lifestyle. through dealing with various issues we. we realized how to avoid divisions build. a professional organizations and more. inclusive and strong link with other. groups 29 years ago in this very same. Congressional Hall Major General Charles. swiy who testified about the decision. dropping atomic bombs used to said one. can only forgive by remembering and to. forget is to risk repeating history the. last rapid deterioration of Human Rights. and their major power is 1933 in.

Germany that year when they enacted the. enabling act which brought German and. the. dictatorship in that year Peter draer. began writing his first book the end of. economic men the origence of. totalitarianism today as we open this. book we feel if history is actually. repeating itself let me adopt some of. his words in today's situation in. China the Chinese substitute CCP for. order but they cannot have a real order. and they worship Xi Jinping when they. have no God to worship. showing its very intensity that they. must have an order a Creed a radical. concept of. man military intimidation against Taiwan. the suppression of. Freedom persecution against lgbtq groups. the re education camps for wias and. Tibetans and the war against religion.

are sign of weakness instead of. strength the more desperate the Chinese. become the the more strongly entrenched. will totalitarianism appear to be the. further they push tot to to totalitarian. Road the greater will they. despair however as soon as we offered an. alternative the whole totalitarian magic. will vanish like a. nightmare this is the current situation. in China and this is our mission we hope. we can show all Chinese a new choice of. possibility for democracy and freedom. lifestyle with dignity and value of. Human. Rights therefore I believe my colleagues. can do their job well I trust my. predecessor from T Square generation can. cooperate effectively I trust my aines. can stand with us and I also believe. that you can make the right. choice ladies and gentlemen of the.

committee I truly appreciate for. listening to my story we doing the best. we can but your help is necessary as. well after all this future belongs to us. belongs to them and belongs to you thank. you.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M9hypBpN-cQ

【#楊若暉 #公民會 #公子時評 #公子沈 】

加入會員：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrGSFNEBmCN0rqhATZels2Q/join

VPN推荐：https://www.expressvpn.com/shen

公子沈社媒帳號：

https://www.twitter.com/terenceshen

https://www.facebook.com/gongzishiping
item.content:encoded:
Mr and Madam we'll have you turn on your. microphone. please hello um I just want to say I. highly agree with my right honorable. friend Mr Joe just said uh the Chinese. Communist party has leashed a war on its. own people that's why also brought this. one with. me this medal was issued to those. soldiers who shot student on Square 35. years ago in normal Nations medals are. given to the soldier Who's acting. distinguished and Brave on the. battlefield against the enemy but in. China the enemy it appears to be its own. people is said commemorative of putting. down the riot those soldiers get this. medal not because of their bravery but. because they're CED not because fighting. the enemy but slaughter their own. people and My Story begins 5 years ago. the 5 years ago today the 30 anniversary.

of durun the 4th I took the street for. the first time committing myself into. the movement of democracy in China I was. deeply intimidated by the atmosphere of. fear cultivated by Chinese Communist. party in. Canada however the 200000 Hong Kong 2019. Hong Kong anti- extradition movement has. further secured my determination of. engaging into the Chinese Democracy. movement in Toronto I have actively. participated with my Hong Kong friends. organizing support report on Democracy. movement supporting the Hong Kong people. as someone from mainland China I have. faced huge pressure from my own. Community dealing with psychological. stress from the harassment of the. Communist supporters and also the. suffering from political. Melancholy things that happened during. the protest remind me that the national.

border cannot stop CCP from spreading. fears. overseas some Chinese organized and. encourag Ed by the consolate drove their. luxury cars through our processing line. and shouting. insults they burned our flowers at the. Statue of democracy some protesters even. received death threatening my life was. full of harassment of the. strangers in 2020 Dr Leon The. Whistleblower of covid-19 who could. possibly Stop This Global catastrophe. from happening was arrested by the. Chinese police of so-called spreading. false statement and labeled as a. criminal he died shortly after due to. the. virus but. surprisingly I witnessed many young. Chinese students attended a m Memorial. event we organized in downtown Toronto.

which deeply moved me I called on. everyone to be organized and bound. together to overcome the fear and. despera and fight for a life of humanity. human rights democracy and freedom. this led the founding of our. organization assembly of citizens over. three years of covid-19 the Young. Generation in China has suffered from. other human right disaster during the. white paper Revolution winter 2022 the. Assembly of Citizen is capable to. organize event and protest across Canada. more professionally more. faster as a group our friend in Europe. became the mailbox of contributors and. resistance Fighters inside great. firewall becoming one of the most. influential acts account as manding. account he collected testimony and. stories for human right catastrophes and. told those stories has been neglected by.

the international Society to millions of. people every day and simultaneously. facing the threats of the Communist. party our friend in US is making movies. talk shows and all forms of Arts in. order to spread the awareness. of the oppression of human rights in. China our friend in Japan and Korea is. trying to establish creative business to. emphasize resistance as a lifestyle. through dealing with various issues we. we realized how to avoid divisions build. a professional organizations and more. inclusive and strong link with other. groups 29 years ago in this very same. Congressional Hall Major General Charles. swiy who testified about the decision. dropping atomic bombs used to said one. can only forgive by remembering and to. forget is to risk repeating history the. last rapid deterioration of Human Rights. and their major power is 1933 in.

Germany that year when they enacted the. enabling act which brought German and. the. dictatorship in that year Peter draer. began writing his first book the end of. economic men the origence of. totalitarianism today as we open this. book we feel if history is actually. repeating itself let me adopt some of. his words in today's situation in. China the Chinese substitute CCP for. order but they cannot have a real order. and they worship Xi Jinping when they. have no God to worship. showing its very intensity that they. must have an order a Creed a radical. concept of. man military intimidation against Taiwan. the suppression of. Freedom persecution against lgbtq groups. the re education camps for wias and. Tibetans and the war against religion.

are sign of weakness instead of. strength the more desperate the Chinese. become the the more strongly entrenched. will totalitarianism appear to be the. further they push tot to to totalitarian. Road the greater will they. despair however as soon as we offered an. alternative the whole totalitarian magic. will vanish like a. nightmare this is the current situation. in China and this is our mission we hope. we can show all Chinese a new choice of. possibility for democracy and freedom. lifestyle with dignity and value of. Human. Rights therefore I believe my colleagues. can do their job well I trust my. predecessor from T Square generation can. cooperate effectively I trust my aines. can stand with us and I also believe. that you can make the right. choice ladies and gentlemen of the.

committee I truly appreciate for. listening to my story we doing the best. we can but your help is necessary as. well after all this future belongs to us. belongs to them and belongs to you thank. you.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M9hypBpN-cQ

【#楊若暉 #公民會 #公子時評 #公子沈 】

item.title: 愛國網紅在日本撒野，尿完就逃！中國移民赴美高喊共產黨萬歲？全球紀念六四掀反共浪潮，多倫多市長也來了！

item.title: 北京的哥駕車衝撞天安門，川普揚言轟炸北京！立法院國會改革正式通過，台灣還安全嗎？
item.itunes:title: 北京的哥駕車衝撞天安門，川普揚言轟炸北京！立法院國會改革正式通過，台灣還安全嗎？
item.itunes:author: 公子沈 Mr. Shen
